memorydb.user.CfnAbout: Specifies a MemoryDB user. For more information, see [Authenticating users with Access Contol Lists (ACLs)](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/memorydb/latest/devguide/clusters.acls.html).

memorydb.user.AccessString.Description: Access permissions string used for this user.

memorydb.user.AuthenticationMode.Description: Denotes whether the user requires a password to authenticate.

memorydb.user.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
